parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: Use this parameter to disable recieving video data from the Orbbec camera. The primary must also be active to receive video data.

parameters.name: top
parameters.label: Orbbec TOP
parameters.description: A reference to the primary that is configuring and controlling the camera. This parameter must be valid to receive any video data.

parameters.name: image
parameters.label: Image
parameters.description: Select which of the camera's video streams to display in the node's output image. The resolution and frame rate of the image are controlled by the parameters on the primary .
